popularStory.headline: Mabel Talvas de Montgomery - Find-a-grave
popularStory.description:
Mabel Talvas de Montgomery

Daughter of and heiress to William II Talvas and his first wife Hildeburge, daughter of Arnulf. She was the granddaughter of William de Talvas and Mathilde de Ganelon. Mabi …

zh.lifeSummary: Adeline or Adeliza de Meulan是Galeran de Beaumont Comte de Meulan和Oda de Conteville的女兒，於1014年11月30日出生在法國i萊-德-福朗斯易維林斯姆奧藍--易維林斯。她於大約1045年與Roger le Barbu de Beaumont Vicomte de Rouen結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1081年4月8日在法國豪-諾門迪艾享年66歲，埋葬在法國豪-諾門迪艾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Adeline or Adeliza de Meulan是Galeran de Beaumont Comte de Meulan和Oda de Conteville的女儿，于1014年11月30日出生在法国i萊-德-福朗斯易維林斯姆奧藍--易維林斯。她于大约1045年与Roger le Barbu de Beaumont Vicomte de Rouen结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1081年4月8日在法国豪-諾門迪艾享年66岁，埋葬在法国豪-諾門迪艾。

nameMeanings.name: Meulan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Galician (Merlán): habitational name from any of the seven places called Merlán in Galicia (Spain), from the ancient Germanic personal name Merila.

nameMeanings.name: Adeline
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: diminutive of Adèle ( see Adele ), used occasionally in England from the early 16th century onwards, and now also found in the wider English-speaking world.

nameMeanings.name: or
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally the name of the god of thunder in Norse mythology, Thor (Old Norse Þórr). It was not used as a personal name during the Middle Ages. The modern name is either a late 18th-century revival of the god's name or else a vernacular development of Tord .

variants.name: Thor
meanings: Originally the name of the god of thunder in Norse mythology, Thor (Old Norse Þórr). It was not used as a personal name during the Middle Ages. The modern name is either a late 18th-century revival of the god's name or else a vernacular development of Tord .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

en.lifeSummary: Adeline or Adeliza de Meulan was born on 30 November 1014, in Meulan-en-Yvelines, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France as the daughter of Galeran de Beaumont Comte de Meulan and Oda de Conteville. She married Roger le Barbu de Beaumont Vicomte de Rouen about 1045. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 8 April 1081, in Eure, Upper Normandy, France, at the age of 66, and was buried in Eure, Upper Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Adeline or Adeliza de Meulan est née le 30 novembre 1014, à Meulan-en-Yvelines, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France, fille de Galeran de Beaumont Comte de Meulan et Oda de Conteville. Elle a épousé Roger le Barbu de Beaumont Vicomte de Rouen environ 1045. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 8 avril 1081, à Eure, Haute-Normandie, France, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterrée à Eure, Haute-Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Adeline or Adeliza de Meulan wurde am 30. November 1014 in Meulan-en-Yvelines, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Frankreich, als Tochter von Galeran de Beaumont Comte de Meulan und Oda de Conteville geboren. Sie hat um 1045 Roger le Barbu de Beaumont Vicomte de Rouen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 8. April 1081 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Eure, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich und wurde in Eure, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Adeline or Adeliza de Meulan è nata il il 30 novembre 1014 nel Meulan-en-Yvelines, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Francia come figlia di Galeran de Beaumont Comte de Meulan e Oda de Conteville. Lei sposato Roger le Barbu de Beaumont Vicomte de Rouen circa 1045. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 8 aprile 1081, nel Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolta a Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Adeline or Adeliza de Meulanは1014年11月30日にフランスiレ-デ-フランスイベラインスメウラン-エン-イベラインスでGaleran de Beaumont Comte de MeulanとOda de Contevilleの娘として生まれた。約1045年にRoger le Barbu de Beaumont Vicomte de Rouenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1081年4月8日にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディエウアで66歳で死去し，フランスハウテ-ノーマンディエウアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Adeline or Adeliza de Meulan(은)는 1014년 11월 30일 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 이벨라이네스 우룰아--이벨라이네스에서 Galeran de Beaumont Comte de Meulan(와)과 Oda de Conteville의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1045년 Roger le Barbu de Beaumont Vicomte de Rouen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1081년 4월 8일 프랑스 하테-노먼디 우르에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 하테-노먼디 우르에 묻혔다.

mn.30 November 1014–8 April 1081: 1014 оны Арваннэгдүгээр сарын 30–1081 оны Дөрөвдүгээр сарын 8

pt.30 November 1014–8 April 1081: 30 de novembro de 1014–8 de abril de 1081
pt.lifeSummary: Adeline or Adeliza de Meulan nasceu em 30 de novembro de 1014, em Meulan-en-Yvelines, Yvelines, Île-de-France, França filha de Galeran de Beaumont Comte de Meulan e Oda de Conteville. Ela casou-se com Roger le Barbu de Beaumont Vicomte de Rouen aproximadamente 1045. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 8 de abril de 1081, em Eure, Haute-Normandie, França, com 66 anos, e foi sepultada em Eure, Haute-Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Adeline or Adeliza de Meulan родилась 30 ноября 1014 г. в местности меулан-ен-ивелаинесь, ивелаинесь, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция. Её родителей звали Galeran de Beaumont Comte de Meulan и Oda de Conteville. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger le Barbu de Beaumont Vicomte de Rouen около 1045 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 8 апреля 1081 г. в местности эур, хауте-норманди, Франция в возрасте 66 лет и была похоронена в местности эур, хауте-норманди, Франция.

es.30 November 1014–8 April 1081: 30 de noviembre de 1014–8 de abril de 1081
es.lifeSummary: Adeline or Adeliza de Meulan nació el 30 de noviembre de 1014, en Meulan-en-Yvelines, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Francia como hija de Galeran de Beaumont Comte de Meulan y Oda de Conteville. Se casó con Roger le Barbu de Beaumont Vicomte de Rouen aproximadamente 1045. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 8 de abril de 1081, en Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultada en Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia.
